nodes.label: Gibraltar (Apex Legend)
nodes.visual_notes: Large, heavily built male character with brown hair pulled back. Wears heavy white and grey tactical armor with prominent large shield on left arm featuring orange accent stripes. Carries a handgun in right hand. Back-mounted equipment pack visible. Armor features tribal/Polynesian-inspired tattoo design on left forearm area. Color palette: white, grey, orange accents, dark skin tone. Role indicators: defensive shield specialist, support/defensive legend.
